name: Fred Fisher
description: German-born American songwriter, Tin Pan Alley music publisher
abstract: Fred Fisher (born Alfred Breitenbach; September 30, 1875 – January 14, 1942) was a German-born American songwriter and Tin Pan Alley music publisher.

works_created.t: There Ain't No Sweet Man That's Worth the Salt of My Tears
I'm on my way to Mandalay

about_quotes.speaker: Mrs. P. Thomas Agnes Brown
about_quotes.evidence: Fred Fisher's sensation. You're the only girl that made me cry.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mrs. P. Thomas Agnes Brown Interview, 1960-10-12
